类似无意义的惨剧再次发生 sort of senseless tragedy from happening again.

您的裁决将成为关键的第一步 Your ruling is a crucial first step.

我国的无人机项目和其他秘密行动 the security of American citizens is the reason our drone program
正是为保护美国公民安全而存在 and other covert operations exist.
但维护安全往往要付出代价 But that security often comes with a cost.
此时此刻  总统正在阿灵顿公墓 At this very moment, the president is at Arlington Cemetery,
下葬三位殒命阿富汗山区的 laying to rest three Navy SEALs
海豹突击队队员 who perished on a mountainside in Afghanistan.
他们献出了自己的生命去拯救他人 They gave their lives to save others.
上帝对亚伯拉罕说"把你的儿子 And God said to Abraham, "Take your son,
亚伯拉罕为《圣经》人物 希伯来民族的创始人 上帝要求他杀子献祭以考验其虔诚
你的独生子  你所爱的以撒   your only son, whom you love, Isaac,
献为燔祭" and sacrifice him."
亚伯拉罕答应了 Abraham was willing.
但当他在圣坛边举刀对着以撒时 But when he raised his knife above Isaac on the altar,
上帝阻止了他 God stopped him.
因为亚伯拉罕已经证明了他对上帝的虔诚 For Abraham had proven his devotion to God.
上帝为证明他对我们的爱 Then God, to prove his devotion to us,
也做出了牺牲 made his own sacrifice.
"上帝爱世人  甚至将他独子献给他们" "For God so loved the world, that he gave his only Son."
虔诚  牺牲 Devotion. Sacrifice.
爱 Love.
这就是上帝教导我们的 This is what the Lord teaches us.
也是这三位年轻人身体力行的 And what these young men have exemplified.
我们将永远尊敬他们 We shall forever honor them.
在天堂  他们将得永生 And in heaven, they will have eternal life.
阿门 Amen.
预备  拉 Ready, pull.
如您所知  在要求撤诉时 As you are aware, we have invoked the State secrets privilege
我们援引了国家机密特权 during our request for dismissal.
但现在总统授权我 But I have authority from the president
公开一些保密文件 to share some of the classified brief
旨在使政府的辩词更可信 in order to reinforce the government's argument.

是的  首席大法官先生  总统也是 I am, Mr. Chief Justice. And so is the president.
那么政府是公开承认为这次袭击负责了 So the government is publicly admitting responsibility for the strike?
没错  法官阁下 It is, Your Honor.
我们成功定位了恐怖分子祖里·阿齐 The terrorist successfully targeted was Zuri Aziz.
他常常利用平民作为人盾 He routinely used civilians as human shields.
默罕默德先生一家不知与阿齐同处一栋楼 Mr. Mahmoud's family did not know Aziz was in the same building.
无人机袭击该为他们的死亡负责 The drone strike is responsible for their deaths.
默罕默德先生遭受了巨大的伤害和损失 Mr. Mahmoud has suffered a terrible injury and loss.
政府的行动虽造成了悲剧  但并非不合法 While the government's action is tragic, it wasn't unlawful.
这次行动是合法  必需以及正确的 It was legal, it was necessary, and it was right.

没有政治觉悟 You don't become Solicitor
是没法当上副检察长的 General without being politically savvy.
当选总统可不只需要觉悟 It takes more than savvy to be elected president.
别忘了 Don't forget,
沃克案调查后她在全国也有点名气了 she has a national profile after the Walker investigation.
真理和正义的化身 Truth and justice personified.
如果领导层想改变党的形象  她... If the leadership wants to redefine the party, she's--
罗斯·佩罗之后再没有 No one with this little experience
美国商人 曾经于1992年和1996年 两次参加总统竞选 虽然最终败选 但取得历来第三党最多的普选票
经验如此匮乏的强劲竞争者了 has ever been a real contender since Ross Perot,
而且他没经验却有的是钱 and at least he had the money.
她也有钱  她家族拥有邓巴装甲车公司 So does she. Her family owns Dunbar Armored Cars.
有必要的话她能负担得起全部竞选费用 She could finance her entire campaign if she needed to.
但有什么能防止权力滥用呢 But what prevents the abuse of power?
行政机关不能立法  不能接受拨款 The executive can't legislate, can't receive appropriations,
不能判人入监 can't sentence people to imprisonment.
这些都要靠其他机构 All of these depend on the other branches,
保证行政权受控 which keeps executive power in check.
但我们都知道  紧急情况下 But we know for a fact that, in emergencies,
行政机关会考虑采取 the executive will contemplate actions
没有明确法律依据的行为 that do not have clear legislative authority
这可能就会与宪法相违背 and might be constitutionally dubious.
包括 Including--
您是要问无人机袭击吗  法官阁下 Are you asking about drone strikes, Your Honor?
没错  无人机袭击 Yes. Drone strikes.
对行政权失控的恐惧被夸大了 The fear of an out-of-control executive is exaggerated.
由于选举压力和其他政治因素 The president has strong electoral and other political incentives
总统采取行动得考虑公众利益 to act in the public interest.
你本人就曾调查过白宫滥用职权的案件 You yourself have investigated the White House for abuse of power.
最后迫使时任总统辞了职 It forced a president to resign.
而现在你又声称 Now you maintain that, uh,
我们应该给总统一些活动空间 we should give our president a wide berth?
我今天不是想维护某个个人 I am not here to defend any one person,
而是要维护总统体制 but rather the office of the presidency itself.
我们必须让政府里的每一个人按章守法办事 We must hold everyone in government accountable to the law.
但我们不能随意解释法律 But we must not manufacture our interpretation of the law
来侵蚀宪法赋予的权威 to erode constitutional authority.
我们能起诉总统本人  但不能动摇总统体制 We can prosecute presidents, but not the presidency.
我们必须假设这事是真的 We have to assume this is happening.
我们必须在她参选之前就堵死她的路子 We need to end her campaign before it begins.
她履历毫无瑕疵 She's clean.

后任命她为特别检察官时又审过一次 then again when he made her special prosecutor.
正因为这些经历  她才如此受欢迎 That's one of the things that makes her so attractive.

如果不能踢她出局 Well, if we can't knock her out,

是啊 Yes, it is.
美国一贯不支持向中东地区 Traditionally, the United States has not supported
派驻军队 military action in the Middle East.
但若有一支中立的联合国维和部队进驻约旦河谷 But a neutral UN peacekeeping force in the Jordan Valley
将为构建一个可持续的  长期的和平局势 is an essential first step to sustainable,
迈出关键的第一步 long-term peace.
美国将赞成这一决议案 The United States will vote "yes."

现在有请俄罗斯联邦的代表进行发言 I give the floor to the representative of the Russian Federation.
俄罗斯也致力于维护地区和平稳定 Russia is also committed to stability in the region.
但让联合国介入如此复杂的局势 But inserting the UN into such a complicated situation
将对实质和平造成无可挽回的损害 could irrevocably damage the hopes of real peace.
我强烈建议我的各位同事 I strongly encourage my colleagues
不要支持此项决议案 to not support this resolution.
谢谢  主席先生 Thank you, Mr. President.
如果没有更多发言请求 With no further requests to speak,
我宣布此决议草案进入表决环节 I put the draft resolution to a vote.

反对的请举手 Those against?

此项决议草案未获通过 The draft resolution does not pass

我们原本希望俄罗斯能改变心意
但他们的否决也在意料之中
因此我们需要您协助我们越过安理会
我们不想削弱常任理事国的否决权
我们不会开创这样的危险先例
如果不能取得联大多数赞成  不能推翻否决

否则我也不会打给您了

以色列不会坚守承诺的 Israel will never maintain its commitment.
以色列和世界上绝大多数国家一样 Israel wants what the rest of the world wants,
都想要长久的安全 sustainable security.
信我一句 Trust me on this,
我在联合国和耶路撒冷打了好多年的交道 I've dealt with Jerusalem for many years at the UN.
一旦局势不利  他们马上就会弃你而去 The moment it gets difficult, they'll turn their back on you.
而局势势必会恶化 And it will get difficult.
你说得对 You're right.

但我知道他们会赞成这项决议案的 but I do know they will vote for this resolution.
拭目以待吧 We'll see.
绕过安理会实在是鲁莽之举 Going around the Security Council is a radical move.
不是鲁莽  是有理有据 It's not radical, it's justified.
你从旧纸堆里翻出60多年前的先例 You dust off some 60-year-old precedent
还觉得是有理有据 and think you're justified?

那是为了阻止朝鲜的进攻 To end North Korea's aggression.

再给我点时间说服他 Give me a little more time to work on him.
已经给你一个月了  我们要行动了 We've given you a month. We're moving forward.

希瑟 Heather.
总统先生 Mr. President.
我听了你今早辩护的音频 I listened to the audio of your defense this morning.
表现很出色 It was outstanding.
您说得没错  要打感情牌 You were right about making the emotional argument.
我觉得这能让国家伤愈  请坐 I think it will help the country heal. Please, have a seat.

亲自向他道歉 To personally apologize.
这么做很有同情心 That's a compassionate thing to do.
听你辩护时  我还注意到 When I listened to your argument, I also heard something else.
雅各布斯法官曾质询你 There was a moment when Justice Jacobs
无人机袭击的事 was asking you about drone strikes.
是  我记得 Yeah, I remember.
他停顿了...非常久 And he paused... for quite a long time.
我觉得  他只是一时卡壳了 I think... he just lost his train of thought.
好吧 Well...
接下来我说的  一定要保密 What I'm about to tell you has to remain between us.
没问题 Of course.
雅各布斯法官有老年痴呆 Justice Jacobs has Alzheimer's.
几个月前他告诉了我 He came to me a few months ago to tell me.
现在还是早期 Now, it's in the early stages,
除非有意观察  不然发现不了 so you wouldn't even notice unless you know what to look for.
他还想待在法庭上吗 He wants to remain on the court?
我要说的就是这个 Well, that's what I want to discuss.
他想退休 He wanted to retire.
我叫他再多等会儿 I asked him to hold on just a little while longer,
让我先找到合适的人选  现在我找到了 until I could find a suitable replacement and now I have.
我觉得...你最合适 And I want that replacement... to be you.
你意下如何 What do you think?
我...自愧不配  先生 I'm... humbled, sir.
您愿考虑我  我着实震惊 And... honestly surprised that you'd consider me.
为什么 Why is that?
因为以前的纠葛 Given our history.
我说过那些都过去了  就都过去了 When I said that was water under the bridge, I meant it.
你有我国最强的法律头脑 You have the finest legal mind in this country,
对宪法理解很透彻 a deep understanding of the Constitution,
共和党不敢阻止你提名 and the Republicans wouldn't dare block your nomination.
毕竟你检举过民主党的总统 After all, you prosecuted a Democratic president.
当副检察长屈才了 You're too good to be Solicitor General.
你要拿稳这个铁饭碗 Let's make sure you have a job for life.
很感激您这么说  先生 I appreciate you saying that, sir.
抱歉 I'm sorry.
容我再考虑考虑 This is a lot to process.
大选前就要搞定这事 It's important we do this before the election.
共和党人当了总统就没准了 We could end up with a Republican president.
除非你真想坐这个位置 And I don't want to suggest your name to Jacobs
不然我不会向雅各布斯提你的名 unless you truly want the position.
所以...现在就告诉我 So... I need to know now.
好  我非常荣幸 Yes. It would be a great honor.
很好  祝贺你 Good. Congratulations.

不必了  过一会儿就好 Don't do that. It'll pass.

恨我的职位 You may hate the office I hold.
但现实是 But here's the reality:
每天我必须做出我但愿是正确的决定 I must make decisions every day that I hope are just.
我也不能一直明辨是非 I don't know right from wrong all the time.
我倒希望我能 I wish I did.
但我决不能优柔寡断 But what I can't be is indecisive.
《古兰经》中说  "夺一无辜之人性命 It says in the Qur'an: "The taking of one innocent life
如了结全人类之性命" is like the taking of all mankind."
不过它也说  "救人一命 It also says that "The saving of one life
如保全人类之命" is like the saving of all mankind."
你把我叫来  不是想跟我道歉 You didn't ask me here to apologize.
而是想让我原谅你 You asked me here to forgive you.
那袭击不是我下的命令 I didn't order the strike that--

我不想让你夜里能安心入睡 I don't want to make it any easier for you to sleep at night.
知道《古兰经》的只字片语也不能免除你的罪孽 And knowing a few lines of the Qur'an does not absolve you.

我发过誓的 I swore an oath.
责任和谋杀之间有道微妙的界线 There's a fine line between duty and murder.
只有你有能力阻止我遭遇的事 Only you have the power to stop what happened to me.
下次你使用这份权力时  希望你能三思 The next time you wield it... I hope you'll think twice.

把默罕默德先生送出去 You show Mr. Mahmoud out.

要覆盖的范围太广了 It's too much ground to cover.

她会认出我来的 She might recognize me.
我来吧 I'll do it.

她一点也不会起疑的 She won't suspect a thing.
如果我们不试点新办法就找不到瑞秋 If we don't try something new, we're not gonna find Rachel.
吃点煮花生吧 Help yourself to some boiled peanuts.
不了  谢谢  盐太多了 No, thank you. Too much salt.
我来这儿的第一周 First week I was here,
我问服务员能不能给我来点煮花生 I asked one of the stewards if I could have some boiled peanuts.
我小的时候经常吃 I used to eat them all the time as a kid,
从那以后的每一天 and I'll be damned if there hasn't been
我都要满满一碗的煮花生 a full bowl of peanuts here every day since.
他们肯定有口昼夜不停煮花生的锅 They must have a pot boiling 'round the clock.
露丝现在让我吃甘蓝脆片 Ruth has me eating kale crisps now.
说对身体好  我受不了那东西 Says they're good for me. I can't stand the things.
我让厨房给剥好了皮 I have them shucked in the kitchen,
这样吃的时候不会弄脏手指 so you don't even have to get your fingers dirty.
随意吃  享受一下生活 Feel free. Live a little.
大法官先生  我们上次谈完后 Mr. Justice, since we last spoke,
我做了很多反省 I've done a lot of soul searching.

奥巴马2008年大选期间对小布什的反恐政策有很多批评 但当选总统后  他在国家安全和反恐政策上 并没有完全放弃小布什政府在反恐事务中的鹰派主张 虽然奥巴马下令美军和情报机构 不许再对被俘的恐怖嫌犯进行"水刑"等逼供措施 但同时也下令扩大在中东地区进行无人机"定点打击"的军事行为 在过去几年中  无人机轰炸 成为奥巴马清除中东恐怖嫌犯的主要手段 这个政策在美国国内招致来自民主党左派 和共和党自由意志派人士的广泛反对 一些民间人权组织不断出版报告称美军行为造成大量无辜民众伤亡

2013年3月  美国司法部长霍德发表声明称 在未经适当司法程序前提下  在美国境内使用无人机 对美国籍恐怖嫌犯进行打击是违宪的 但是霍德没有说在境外进行无人机打击是违宪行为 司法部长霍德的声明发表后  来自肯塔基州的共和党参议员 着名的自由意志派政客兰德·保罗 在国会进行了长达13个小时的马拉松式演讲 其主题就是抗议美军出动无人机定点消灭美国籍的恐怖分子 他认为无论在国内还是国外 未经司法程序针对美国公民的无人机打击都是违宪的
